description: Directed service dependency graph. An edge {from: A, to: B} means service A calls service B. Note the `node` field on each service is the k8s node its pods are scheduled on — co-location is NOT a call edge but can still couple failures.
note: auth, cart, and image-resize sit in three DIFFERENT branches of the call graph (auth and cart hang directly off api-gateway; image-resize hangs off catalog). There is NO service-call edge connecting them to each other. batch-importer is a CronJob with no inbound/outbound service edges at all. The only thing the three failing services share is node-7.
